title: My First Blog
content:
今天写我的第一篇博客。这几天我在忙着将自己本地电脑上的项目通过git上传到github
记录一下我搭建在github上的一个项目：生日祝福网站代码。这是一个在其他博主的网盘中复制来的，经过我的修改，更符合我的审美。
这原先是为我的一个朋友设计的网页，并没有搭载在服务器上，现在借用github pages功能，使其能够通过链接访问。
这是主页的效果：

网站的链接：Happy_Birthday

Today, I wrote my first blog post. These days, I have been busy uploading my local projects to GitHub via Git.
I would like to document a project I set up on GitHub: the code for a birthday blessing website. This project was copied from another blogger’s cloud storage and has been modified by me to better suit my aesthetic preferences.
Originally, this webpage was designed for a friend of mine and was not hosted on a server. Now, by leveraging the GitHub Pages feature, it can be accessed via a link.
Here is the effect of the homepage:

The link to the website: Happy_Birthday
Due to network issues, the parsing of the above web pages was unsuccessful. If you need the content of these web pages, please check the validity of the web page links and try again appropriately. If you do not need the parsing of these links, you can also ask your questions, and I will answer them as normal.

title: Hello World
content:
随着自己学习计算机的内容越来越深入，枯燥无味的气息充斥了我的学习生活。
为了打破这种局面，我决定弄个博客来记录我的计算机学习生涯。
开始学习计算机的时间是在高中，不过高中的我并没有太深入地学习计算机，在弄懂计算机的基础原理概念并学习掌握了一些编程后，就没有继续深入学习。
因此，现在既是新手也是老手的我，有着很大的学习空间与学习潜力，加油吧！！

As I delve deeper into computer learning, the air of tedium has filled my study life. 
To break this situation, I’ve decided to start a blog to record my computer learning journey. 
I began learning computer science in high school, but back then I didn’t go too deep into it. After understanding the basic principles and concepts of computers and learning some programming, I didn’t continue to study further.
So now, I’m both a newbie and an experienced learner, with a lot of learning space and potential. Come on!!
